title: BAI Implements 3x15 Scoring for Domestic Junior Tournaments
indian_angle: This new scoring system will directly impact young Indian badminton players competing in national and domestic ranking tournaments.
summary: The Badminton Association of India (BAI) announced the implementation of a 3x15 scoring system for domestic ranking tournaments and national championships in the U-13, U-15, and U-17 categories, set to debut at Ernakulam.

title: Kidambi Srikanth Finishes Runner-Up at US Open
indian_angle: Indian star Kidambi Srikanth reached the final of the US Open, showcasing strong form on the international circuit.
summary: Indian shuttler Kidambi Srikanth advanced to the final of the US Open before losing to Su Li Yang, finishing as the runner-up in the Super 300 event.

title: Srikanth's Sportsmanship Shines in US Open Final Run
indian_angle: This article highlights Kidambi Srikanth's exemplary sportsmanship during his US Open campaign, a quality admired by Indian fans.
summary: A feature article recounted an instance of Kidambi Srikanth's remarkable sportsmanship during his run to the US Open final, where he voluntarily overturned a point given to him.

title: Rounak Chouhan Upsets World No 6 at US Open
indian_angle: Young Indian talent Rounak Chouhan delivered a significant upset by defeating a top-ranked player at an international tournament.
summary: Indian shuttler Rounak Chouhan, a self-proclaimed Cristiano Ronaldo fan, caused a major upset at the US Open by defeating World No. 6 Chou Tien Chen.

title: Addendum to Junior Asia Championships Selection Criteria Released
indian_angle: The updated criteria are crucial for aspiring Indian junior players aiming to represent the country at the Badminton Asia U17 & U15 Junior Championships.
summary: The Badminton Association of India (BAI) issued a further addendum to the selection criteria for the Badminton Asia U17 & U15 Junior Championships 2026, impacting the qualification process for young Indian shuttlers.
